flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Platt College-Los Angeles rose 82% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.2k → $13.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Platt College-Los Angeles rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.5k → $33.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Platt College-Los Angeles vs the 2018–2022 baseline (62.3% vs 68.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Platt College-Los Angeles rose 290% between 2006 and 2009 (102 → 398).
